feed.title: XX DH AXS Transmission RD (RD-XX-DHE-A1) — firmware
feed.subtitle: Production firmware releases for SRAM RD-XX-DHE-A1.

entry.title: XX DH AXS Transmission RD (RD-XX-DHE-A1) — firmware 2.55.6
entry.summary:
XX DH AXS Transmission RD RD-XX-DHE-A1 — firmware 2.55.6

Part: RD TopGun DH

Please ensure your AXS App and Karoo Bike Computer are on the latest version before installing this Device Firmware Update. - This firmware update contains minor bug fixes, platform updates, future product support, and reliability improvements.

Released: 2026-06-23
